reach_why: Extends familiar debates on creativity and framing, but does not clearly introduce a wholly unprecedented explanatory domain.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links Einstein reframing, token reuse, and problem-selection limits in LLM originality.
falsifiable_why: Testable by comparing within-frame explanation against autonomous problem-selection and reframing performance.
explanation: Originality may depend less on new words than on choosing and transforming the right explanatory frame.
